name: Extreme Ball Balancer 3D
description: Test your reflexes and precision in this ultimate balancing challenge! Navigate a rolling ball across treacherous wooden bridges, narrow rails, and shifting traps surrounded by deep blue water. With realistic physics and intense 3D graphics, one wrong move sends you plunging into the depths. Web Dev https://www.brightestgames.com/ Master the controls, keep your balance, and overcome every obstacle to reach the finish line. Do you have the steady hand to survive the extreme path?
instructions: WASD to controll the ball use mouse to change camera from left and right on the screen
